title: webhook — background jobs
description: Four jobs. DispatchWebhookJob is the workhorse; WebhookProbeJob is the scheduled health probe; PruneWebhookDeliveriesJob enforces retention; AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptionsJob handles version-sunset cascade.

jobs.purpose: Send one delivery to one subscription. Wrapped in Bus::batch() by WebhookEventDispatcher for fan-out. Handles versioning transformer chain, rate limiting, signing, destination dispatch, response parsing, state transition, retry scheduling.
steps: Load WebhookDelivery + parent WebhookSubscription.
Check rate limit: if per-minute cap reached, defer to next_attempt_at = start of next minute + return WITHOUT transitioning state.
Check subscription state: if paused/disabled, mark delivery cancelled + return.

Resolve payload transformer chain via versioning::PayloadTransformerRegistry (subscription.api_version → event's current version). If missing edge: mark delivery failedPermanent + reason=transformer_missing + fire versioning::TransformerMissing observability event.
Apply transformer chain to payload.
Sign: HmacSigner::sign(payload, subscription.secret, timestamp). If rotation grace active + subscription.secret_previous set, also compute signature_previous.
Build request: verb + url (from destination_config) + headers (7 signature headers + user_agent + Content-Type) + body (compress if compress_payload).
Resolve destination driver via WebhookDestinationRegistry.
Transition state pending → inFlight; record attempted_at.
driver.send(request) → capture response_status + response_headers + response_body (truncated) + response_body_bytes + duration_ms.

Classify per config('webhook.status_policy'): success (2xx) → state=delivered; retryable (408/425/429/5xx) → failedRetryable; 410 → failedPermanent + subscription auto-disable; other 4xx → failedPermanent.
If failedRetryable: compute next_attempt_at via BackoffStrategyResolver + schedule via delay(); RetryAfterAwareBackoffStrategy reads Retry-After header from response.
If failedPermanent + attempt_number < max_attempts: NOT scheduled (permanent = no retry).
Fire the matching state event afterCommit.
jobs.notes: Job tries=1 because retry orchestration is state-machine-driven. A crashed job leaves the delivery in state=inFlight with attempted_at set — the ReconcileDeliveriesJob (foundation) picks up stuck rows > 30 min old.

jobs.purpose: Health probe: send a HEAD (or GET) to every active subscription's destination + track consecutive_probe_failures. Reachability sanity check without dispatching a real event.
steps: For each active WebhookSubscription (batched to avoid burst load):
driver.probe(subscription) → sends HEAD (or GET when HEAD 405s) to destination URL.
On success (2xx or 405): reset consecutive_probe_failures to 0.
On failure: increment consecutive_probe_failures.
If >= config('webhook.probe.failure_threshold', 3): fire WebhookProbeFailed + dispatch admin notification.
jobs.notes: Runs from schedule (daily). Manual invocation via `webhook:probe` command.

jobs.purpose: Hard-delete WebhookDelivery rows older than config('webhook.audit.prune_after_days', 30). Chunked at prune_chunk_size (default 1000).
steps: Query: SELECT id FROM webhook_deliveries WHERE created_at < now() - prune_after_days LIMIT chunk_size.
Delete in transactional batches.
Loop until no rows returned.
Emit metric: webhook_deliveries_pruned_total by tenant + increment counter.
jobs.notes: Runs from schedule daily 03:00 UTC. Idempotent — no-op when nothing to prune.

jobs.purpose: Handle version-sunset cascade. Dispatched by versioning::AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptions listener on versioning::ApiVersionSunset.
steps: Load sunset ApiVersion + its migration_target_slug.
Query: SELECT * FROM webhook_subscriptions WHERE api_version = sunset_slug AND state IN (active, paused).
For each:
If migration_target_slug set + target version is released: UPDATE api_version = migration_target_slug + fire WebhookSubscriptionUpgraded.
Else: transition state → disabled + reason=api_version_sunset + fire WebhookSubscriptionDisabled.
Dispatch admin notification (WebhookSubscriptionUpgradedNotification or WebhookSubscriptionDisabledNotification).
